field_purpose.assignment_family: Stable instructional family selected before artifact generation.
field_purpose.grade_subject_fit: Why the family fits the grade and subject context.
field_purpose.unit_context: Short description of topic and placement in the unit.
field_purpose.assignment_purpose: What thinking and evidence the assignment is designed to produce.
field_purpose.final_evidence_target: Declared final evidence target before activity design.
field_purpose.success_criteria: Visible criteria for acceptable work quality.
field_purpose.supports_scaffolds: Embedded supports at likely friction points.
field_purpose.differentiation_model: How aligned support/core/extension pathways are handled.
field_purpose.checkpoint_release_logic: Checkpoint or release rules for multi-day tasks.
field_purpose.teacher_implementation_notes: Teacher-facing use notes and management constraints.
field_purpose.likely_misconceptions: Known likely misunderstandings or weak patterns.
field_purpose.assessment_focus: Primary evidence the teacher is assessing.
